description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy modeled after an owl, featuring a rounded body with detailed feather-like texturing across its surface. The face is characterized by large, round, yellow and black eyes set within prominent white eye patches, and a small, black beak at the center. The body is predominantly light brown with darker brown accents, mimicking the natural coloration of an owl's plumage. The back and sides display sculpted feather patterns, with subtle shading to enhance the three-dimensional effect. The toy appears soft and squeezable, likely filled with synthetic stuffing, and has no visible limbs or wings, giving it a compact, egg-like shape. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the exterior.
description: A soft, plush owl stuffed toy with large yellow and black eyes, textured brown feathers, and a rounded, squeezable body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the owl's large, round eyes, white facial patches, and small black beak, with detailed feather texture on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded body, feather texturing, and the side profile of the face with one eye partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the owl, showing the full feather pattern and absence of facial features or limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with feather details and a partial view of the face and one eye.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, round eyes and a small, closed beak, giving the appearance of calm attentiveness.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in an upright, seated posture with its body rounded and no visible limbs or wings.
